# FAIRPASS

> FAIRPASS is a B2B event management platform that integrates online registration, on-site QR check-in, instant badge printing, and attendee data management into a single system. Headquartered in Korea with operations in Singapore.

## What FAIRPASS Does

FAIRPASS provides three core products for event organizers:

- **Registration Platform (SaaS)**: Custom registration forms, payment processing, attendee statistics, automated notifications — all in one platform.
- **Self-Service Kiosk (Hardware)**: QR-based check-in, on-demand badge printing, sponsor ad display — fully automated, no staff required.
- **Paper Badge (Eco Product)**: Korea's first 100% all-paper badge. Zero plastic. FSC-certified. Biodegradable. Patent-registered.

## Key Facts

- 800+ client organizations across Korea and internationally
- 1,700+ events managed
- Clients include: LG Electronics, Hyundai Motor Company, Samsung Life Insurance, POSCO, ADB, APEC, UNWTO, Seoul National University, Yonsei University, Korea University, COEX, BEXCO, Korea Tourism Organization
- Client categories: corporations, government & public institutions, PCO/event planning agencies, universities & academic societies, international organizations
- 6,840 kg+ of plastic reduced through paper badge adoption
- Equivalent to planting 1,240+ trees (CO₂ absorption basis)
- 2 eco-technology patents registered
- 100% FSC-certified paper used

## Services

### Registration Platform
Custom online registration for events of any size. Features: form builder, payment gateway integration, real-time attendee dashboard, automated email/SMS notifications, QR code generation.

### Self-Service Kiosk
On-site hardware kiosk for events. Attendees scan QR code → badge prints instantly. Eliminates registration queues. Supports sponsor branding display.

### Paper Badge (페패 / FAIRPASS Badge)
All-paper name badge system — lanyard, connector, and inner card all made from paper. Water-resistant. Fully recyclable as paper after the event. Available for purchase individually via Naver Smart Store.

## Coverage

- Primary market: Korea (Seoul, Busan, Incheon, nationwide)
- International: Singapore (incorporated), global events support
- Event types: conferences, academic congresses, AGMs, trade fairs, forums, seminars, product launches, government ceremonies
